seoTitle: Woolundunga vs Woomera — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Woolundunga and Woomera. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Woolundunga and Woomera.
heading: Woolundunga vs Woomera — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Woolundunga, South Australia and Woomera, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Woolundunga has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Woomera (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Woolundunga or Woomera safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Woolundunga has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Woomera scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Woolundunga scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Woomera scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Woolundunga or Woomera?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Woolundunga has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
